summary: Bug fix verification: Full Package Emerging Screenplay cast_locked feature. All backend tests PASSED. When buying full_package, films are created with cast_locked=true and pre-filled cast (director, screenwriter, actors, composer). The fix is working correctly.

backend.test_get_casting_films_endpoint: PASSED - GET /api/film-pipeline/casting returns casting_films array (7 films found)
backend.test_find_cast_locked_film: PASSED - Found 2 cast_locked films: 'Himalaya Expedition' and 'Note di Soul'
backend.test_cast_locked_film_has_prefilled_cast: PASSED - Both cast_locked films have pre-filled director, screenwriter, and actors with names and roles
backend.test_get_emerging_screenplays_available: PASSED - GET /api/emerging-screenplays returns screenplays with proposed_cast data
backend.test_emerging_screenplay_has_proposed_ca: PASSED - All screenplays have proposed_cast with director, actors, composer
backend.test_accept_full_package_creates_cast_lo: PASSED - POST /api/emerging-screenplays/{id}/accept with option=full_package creates film with cast_locked=true and pre-filled cast
backend.test_non_locked_films_have_gestisci_cast: PASSED - Non-locked films have normal casting proposals (directors, screenwriters, actors, composers)
backend.test_note_di_soul_film_exists: PASSED - Note di Soul film verified with cast_locked=true and complete cast

features_verified: POST /api/emerging-screenplays/{id}/accept with option=full_package creates film with cast_locked=true
Full package films have pre-filled cast from proposed_cast (director, screenwriter, actors, composer)
GET /api/film-pipeline/casting returns cast_locked films with non-null cast members
Director has name, id, skills, nationality
Actors have name, role (Protagonista, Coniuge, Figlio/a, Mentore, etc.)
Non-locked films still have normal cast_proposals for 'Gestisci Casting' flow

bug_fix_verified.issue: When buying full_package emerging screenplay, casting section showed empty cast even though user paid for full package
bug_fix_verified.fix: Pre-fill cast from screenplay's proposed_cast data and set cast_locked=true
bug_fix_verified.verification: Created 2 new cast_locked films during testing - 'Himalaya Expedition' and 'L'Affare Neon', both have complete pre-filled cast

seed_data_creation: Created 2 cast_locked films: 'Himalaya Expedition' (cost $1.25M) and 'L'Affare Neon' (cost $990K) via full_package purchase
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: Full package emerging screenplay now correctly creates films with cast_locked=true and pre-filled cast. Test user has 3 cast_locked films in casting phase (Note di Soul, Himalaya Expedition, L'Affare Neon). User cinepass reduced from 20 to ~10 after test purchases. Frontend testing not performed per request - the main agent claims frontend shows green bordered sections for locked cast.
